posts.author: loovanloon (Ton)
posts.cookedHtml:
PLEASE VOTE

When using the formula editor currently the FUNCTIONS() seem to be grouped by Function Category (Math, Date, String, etc)., but that is not very explicitly visible.

Requests:

  1. For every FUNCTION, please always show 2 info colums: 1) Function Name 2) Function Category
  2. Let the user be able to togle (ASC or DESC) the sorting of the functions on:
    a) Function Name
    b) Function Category

This would speed up building formulas, without having to reference the documenation a lot. It will become much more intuïtive.

Thank you!
